posts.content:
#ICLR2026 paper✨️: Quantifying epistemic uncertainty of Blackbox classifiers, and link to better decisions

Calibration on steroids, qualifying full prediction uncertainty with no need for Bayes, and tuning individual decisions 👇

interestSummary: Gael Varoquaux is currently focused on advancing uncertainty quantification in machine learning, specifically developing methods to measure epistemic uncertainty in blackbox classifiers without Bayesian approaches, as highlighted by his recent ICLR 2026 paper.
